payload.prompt:
Project: case-002-bag-reference-replication
Target market: US
Target language: en-US
Project notes: Bag reference video replication case: premium handbag TikTok ecommerce hook based on the uploaded bag video skeleton.
Sequence plan: Sequence 1 - hook - Make the handbag feel premium, versatile, and worth clicking within the first seconds.
Primary visual subject: Premium structured handbag hero demo
Create a 9:16 TikTok ecommerce product video segment inspired by the uploaded bag reference video. Show a premium structured handbag as the hero product, with smooth handheld push-in, zipper and stitching close-ups, clean product handling, a brief styling moment, and boutique lighting. Keep the bag centered and desirable, no text overlay, no visible brand logo, realistic materials, polished social commerce look.
Visual constraints: {'style': 'premium_ecommerce_bag_demo', 'camera': 'smooth handheld push-in, detail close-ups, elegant product handling', 'platform': 'tiktok_9_16', 'background': 'clean boutique / neutral lifestyle setting'}
payload.negative_prompt: blurry, warped bag shape, broken zipper, extra straps, fake logos, watermark, captions, text overlay, low quality, distorted hands
